cefunctionid.SQL: UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_CE_FR_PENDING = 'Y',C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_NO ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_NO%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

SQL.errInfo: There is a pending request exists, please wait for the bank to process first.

cefunctionid.SQL: UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_REQ_FIN_FLG = 'Y' WHERE C_MAIN_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND (FA_REQ_FIN_FLG = '' OR FA_REQ_FIN_FLG IS NULL OR FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-')

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_CE_FR_PENDING = 'Y',C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

SQL.errInfo: There is a pending request exists, please wait for the bank to process first.

cefunctionid.SQL: UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_IS_BANK = '2', FA_APPL_LMT_AMT = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-' WHERE C_MAIN_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND (FA_IS_BANK = '' OR FA_IS_BANK IS NULL) AND (FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '' OR FA_CE_MAIN_REF IS NULL)

SQL.errInfo: There is a pending request exists, please wait for the bank to process first.

cefunctionid.SQL: UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-' WHERE C_MAIN_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND (FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '' OR FA_CE_MAIN_REF IS NULL OR FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-')

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_CE_SR_PENDING = 'Y',C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_REQ_BUYER_APR_FLG='2', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Active' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1' AND FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Pending'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER T1 SET T1.INV_POOL_STATUS= 'IN' WHERE T1.FSBC_REF = (SELECT T2.C_MAIN_REF FROM -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER T2 WHERE T2.C_MAIN_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND T2.INV_FIN_MODE = 'POOL') AND T1.FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND T1.FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND T1.FA_DOC_TYPE = '1' AND T1.FA_DOC_STATUS = 'Active' AND T1.INV_PASS_POOL_VAL = 'Yes'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER T1 SET T1.FA_TTL_INV_AMT = T1.FA_TTL_INV_AMT + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-,T1.FA_TTL_ADJ_AMT = T1.FA_TTL_ADJ_AMT + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-, T1.FA_TTL_INV_BAL = T1.FA_TTL_INV_BAL + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-,T1.FA_TTL_ADJ_BAL = T1.FA_TTL_ADJ_BAL + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-, T1.AMT_AVAL_FOR_FUNDING = T1.AMT_AVAL_FOR_FUNDING + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%- * -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_MAX_LOAN_PERC%- / 100 WHERE T1.C_MAIN_REF = (SELECT T2.FSBC_REF FROM -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER T2 WHERE T2.FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND T2.FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND T2.FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND T2.FA_DOC_TYPE = '1' AND T2.FA_DOC_STATUS = 'Active' AND T2.INV_PASS_POOL_VAL = 'Yes')

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Reject', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F',EXCP_REASON = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_REJ_REASON%-' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_REQ_BUYER_APR_FLG='2', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND (FA_DOC_TYPE = '2' OR FA_DOC_TYPE = '3')

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Active' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND (FA_DOC_TYPE = '2' OR FA_DOC_TYPE = '3') AND FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Pending'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Reject', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND (FA_DOC_TYPE = '2' OR FA_DOC_TYPE = '3')

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.POMM_MASTER SET FA_REQ_BUYER_APR_FLG='2', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FA_SBR_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND PO_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_REF%-' AND PO_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '8'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.POMM_MASTER SET PO_STATUS= 'Active', PO_BAL= -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_AMT%- , PO_LOAN_AVL = -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_AMT%- * -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_MAX_LOAN_PERC%- / 100 WHERE FA_SBR_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND PO_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_REF%-' AND PO_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '8' AND PO_STATUS= 'Pending'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER T1 SET T1.FA_TTL_PO_AMT = T1.FA_TTL_PO_AMT + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_AMT%-,T1.PO_AVAL_FOR_FUNDING = T1.PO_AVAL_FOR_FUNDING + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_AMT%- * -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_MAX_LOAN_PERC%- / 100 WHERE T1.C_MAIN_REF = (SELECT T2.FA_SBR_REF FROM -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.POMM_MASTER T2 WHERE T2.FA_SBR_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND T2.PO_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_REF%-' AND T2.PO_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND T2.FA_DOC_TYPE = '8' AND T2.PO_STATUS= 'Active')

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.POMM_MASTER SET PO_STATUS= 'Reject', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FA_SBR_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND PO_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_REF%-' AND PO_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_PO_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '8'
